title: Outpost Playground | Presidio Playground | San Francisco Playground | The Presidio (San Francisco)
content: Children play on boulders at Presidio Tunnel Tops. # Outpost Playground. Spark your imagination and have fun at San Francisco's biggest playground. This unique San Francisco playground at Presidio Tunnel Tops is unlike any other in the city. With many different levels of physical challenges to explore, it’s one of the best playgrounds in San Francisco where kids of different ages can have fun together. There are all-gender wheelchair accessible restrooms right next to the Outpost at the Field Station building. Parties and group gatherings are not allowed at the Outpost, but you can find plenty of nearby outdoor event space at Presidio Tunnel Tops. Are pets allowed in the Outpost playground? With two acres for kids to explore, the Outpost, sometimes referred to as the Presidio Playground, is the biggest and most adventurous play space of its kind in the Bay Area, and it’s surrounded by one of the best parks in San Francisco for family fun.
